ogTitle: Mairjimmy vs Maison Dieu: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mairjimmy and Maison Dieu.
heading: Mairjimmy vs Maison Dieu — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mairjimmy, New South Wales and Maison Dieu, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mairjimmy has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Maison Dieu (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mairjimmy or Maison Dieu safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mairjimmy has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Maison Dieu scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mairjimmy scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Maison Dieu scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mairjimmy or Maison Dieu?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mairjimmy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
